Text: Dream is defined as the mental activity of the sleeper in as much as he is asleep
dreaming is an extension of waking life. Our dreams are always linked to the ideas8 that occupied consciousness shortly beforehand
occur to one to reduce the whole phenomenon of dream to one of remembering
The sensory stimuli that reach us during sleep may very well become sources of dream.
suggest that the whole dream had in fact been based on it alone and found therein its truly essential logical point, its naturally indicated final objective
